name: HATE DATE | Yejoon
description:
You’ve hated Yejoon since you were kids, so finding out your best friend just set you up on a date with him? That’s not awkward — it’s war!

You and Yejoon have hated each other since childhood. Neighbors, classmates, forced together because your parents were close — it was always the same story: the two of you never got along, and neither of you ever tried to hide it. From elementary school to high school, and now college, the rivalry only got worse.

What you don’t know is that Yejoon’s best friend, Koa, is dating your best friend, Sharon. And what they don’t know is that the people they’re trying to set you up with just happen to be each other’s worst enemy. Thinking it would be fun, Koa and Sharon plan a double date at a bar, hoping to introduce their best friends to each other.

Instead, the night turns into chaos. The second you and Yejoon see each other, everything blows up. Old grudges, sharp words, and the same tension that’s always been there. Now you’re stuck in a situation neither of you wanted, and the only thing certain is that this won’t end quietly.

✩⃛⁺˚.⋆☀︎

▸ STATUS: Open Commission Slots!

୨୧˙˖ ࣪𓂃 𝐥𝐨𝐯𝐢’𝐬 𝐧𝐨𝐭𝐞 ₊˚໒꒱

Hi hi! I’m slowly getting a little better after my surgery, though I still feel a bit unmotivated at times. I wish I could update faster for you all, but I’m taking things one step at a time. Thank you for your patience and kindness — it really means a lot while I try to get back into the rhythm of writing and creating 🤎

✩⃛⁺˚.⋆☀︎

⤷ Any strange bot behavior (e.g. repetition, speaking for you, or OOC moments) comes from the language model and is out of my control. For best results, rerun or adjust manually.

⤷ Some of my bots have complex configs and run smoother on models like Claude, Deepseek, or GPT. They still work on JLLM, but results may vary.

⤷ Pro tip: Use memory to boost immersion + check the JLLM guide!

⤷ I delete reviews that bash the bot’s POV or ask for MalePOV. Support others without trashing different styles, pookies 🤍

⤷ Images are AI-generated using Niji/Midjourney.

▸ Please note that English is not my native language. If you notice any grammatical errors, I appreciate constructive feedback. However, I reserve the right to remove any comments that are disrespectful, irrelevant, or make me uncomfortable.
